detail.description: Graham Pauley singles on a line drive to center fielder A.J. Ewing.
Graham Pauley singles on a fly ball to left fielder José Fermín.
Graham Pauley singles on a line drive to left fielder Nathan Church.
Graham Pauley doubles (4) on a fly ball to right fielder Spencer Steer, deflected by center fielder Dane Myers.
Graham Pauley doubles (2) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Derek Hill.
Graham Pauley hits a ground-rule double (1) on a fly ball down the right-field line. Heriberto Hernández to 3rd.
Graham Pauley singles on a ground ball to third baseman Kyle Karros. Griffin Conine to 2nd.
Graham Pauley homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Xavier Edwards scores. Liam Hicks scores.
Graham Pauley singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Owen Caissie to 2nd.
Graham Pauley singles on a line drive to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Owen Caissie scores.
Graham Pauley doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Michael Harris II.

Graham Pauley doubles (5) on a fly ball to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. Connor Norby scores. Javier Sanoja out at home on the throw, right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to catcher Drake Baldwin.
Graham Pauley singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II.
Graham Pauley doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge. Jakob Marsee scores. Otto Lopez scores. Griffin Conine to 3rd.
